rules.name: block-rm-all
rules.reason: NEVER delete files without explicit user permission. Ask user to run rm themselves.

rules.name: block-git-rm
rules.reason: NEVER remove tracked files. Ask user to run git rm themselves.

rules.name: block-git-clean
rules.reason: NEVER clean untracked files. Ask user to run git clean themselves.

rules.name: block-git-checkout-dot
rules.reason: NEVER discard changes with checkout. Ask user to do it themselves.

rules.name: block-git-reset-hard
rules.reason: NEVER reset --hard. Ask user to do it themselves.
